name: Wild Rice Turkey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package (6 oz.) long grain and wild rice mix, cooked as directed
1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup
1 can (8 oz.) water chestnuts, drained and sliced, reserve liquid
1 can (4 oz.) mushrooms, drained, reserve liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Add the reserved liquids from the water chestnuts and mushrooms to a bowl, measuring until you have a total of 1 cup.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, cubed turkey, celery, onion, cream of mushroom soup, reserved liquid from water chestnuts, reserved liquid from mushrooms, soy sauce, bread crumbs, and melted butter or margarine.
4. Transfer the mixture to a 3-quart baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the top with the remaining bread crumbs and melted butter or margarine.
6. Bake, uncovered, for about 1 hour.
7. This recipe serves approximately 8 people.
